title: Multiverse
body:
### **About**

Multiverse is a mod that adds rifts that transport entities to randomly generated dimensions.

**1.18+** naturally only uses vanilla biomes but is also compatible with biomes added to the Overworld and Nether through [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender).

**1.21+** also supports End biomes added through [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender).

**If rifts are invisible because of custom shaders look for the "vanillaOnly" client config to disable the rift shaders.**

### **Features**

##### _Rifts_

Rifts are generated randomly with each color linking up to different dimension. Rifts may be incredibly dangerous and spawn over void or at a high height so be prepared. 

The dimensions that rifts target can be configured with a data pack. 

![Rift](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ow3vutYY/images/f12098a2f5f6ff6ea93df9c0c867249e3e292830.png)

##### _Generated Dimensions_

Random dimensions can be generated when the server starts. The biomes, structure, and time cycle of each generated dimension is completely randomly set. The number of generated dimensions is limitless but dependent on server configs.

![Noodles Dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ow3vutYY/images/62ea5c64f9ca301aab4ce84031bdd44ff788eaf3.png)

##### _Items_

It is recommended to use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) in order to get item recipes.

The Traveler entity randomly spawns near rifts, drops a dimensional prism, and has a chance of giving the bounty effect on death.

The Conqueror entity spawns when a player enters a village with the bounty effect and drops a multiversal beacon.

Kaleidite cores can be thrown in order to spawn a random rift. It can also be thrown into a rift to destroy it.
